title: Operations Rail Console
concept: A full-width live WordPress browser protected by a compact command bar, a left operations rail, and a right inspector where Create, Save, Library, Manage, Blueprints, Data, Logs, and Transfer modes mutate the same active Playground object.
focus: large live browser with right inspector
saved identity and transfer history mutation
flows: Save a temporary Playground to a local directory with folder picker, permission grant or denial, file-copy progress, selected folder identity, local badge, saved-library row transformation, and reload consequence
Download database.sqlite from the SQLite-backed database with selected database state, progress, success result, transfer history, logs, and preview update
Start or import through Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and .zip import with replacement confirmation
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with open, manage, rename, delete confirmation, final row removal, and active-site fallback
Use Site Manager settings, files, Blueprint editor, database tools, logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip while the live WordPress shell remains visible
Browse a representative subset of the 43 Blueprint gallery entries with categories, search, selected detail, URL, copy, download, run, validation, and result state
featureCoverage: Featured blueprint shortcuts and selected detail
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Folder permission grant, denial, cancellation, and reload consequence
Open, manage, rename, and delete saved sites
Delete confirmation and fallback active state
Temporary, browser-saved, and local-directory identity badges
Destructive reset and saved reload behavior
File browser with new file, new folder, upload, browse, selected editor, dirty marker, save, and result state
Blueprint editor with JSON validation, copy, download, run, and result state
Database driver, path, size, selected state, download progress, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with event records
Transfer history for GitHub, ZIP, database, Blueprint, local save, and browser save
